headings.text: URC's TDC-8300 and TRC-1120 for Smart Home Control
URC's TDC-8300 and TRC-1120 for Smart Home Control
TDC-8300: A Tabletop Touch Screen with Versatile Features
TRC-1120: A Handheld Remote Designed for Efficiency

bodyText: MenuHomeServicesBrandsPortfolioAboutExciting PRoductsContactHome CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworkingURC's TDC-8300 and TRC-1120 for Smart Home ControlPosted on January 8, 2025URC's TDC-8300 and TRC-1120 for Smart Home ControlUniversal Remote Control (URC) has announced the release of two new devices designed to enhance smart home and commercial automation: the TDC-8300 tabletop touch screen and the TRC-1120 handheld remote.Both devices prioritize functionality and integration, offering practical tools for managing connected systems.‍‍TDC-8300: A Tabletop Touch Screen with Versatile FeaturesThe TDC-8300 is an 8-inch color LCD touch screen intended for comprehensive control of smart home systems. Its design is contemporary, aiming to integrate seamlessly into various interior settings while offering practical features for day-to-day use.Features include:Integrated Voice Control: Supports Amazon Alexa, Comcast Xfinity, and Apple TV, allowing for compatibility with widely used platforms.Video Intercom Capabilities: Includes integration with Ring devices for live video monitoring and two-way communication.Streamlined Control: Operates via URC’s Total Control® Accelerator 3 software, managing multiple systems such as lighting, entertainment, and security.Sensors and Quick Access: Equipped with proximity and ambient light sensors for immediate response and usability.The device is designed to be a functional control hub, offering homeowners and professionals the ability to manage a wide range of automated systems from one interface.‍‍TRC-1120: A Handheld Remote Designed for EfficiencyThe TRC-1120 provides an alternative for those preferring handheld devices for system management. With a 2-inch color LCD display and hard buttons, it is built for straightforward operation.Key elements include:Compact Design: Combines a small touch screen with physical buttons for ease of use.Broad Compatibility: Like the TDC-8300, it works with Amazon Alexa, Comcast Xfinity, and Apple TV, ensuring it functions within diverse smart home environments.Integration with Ring: Offers live video and communication capabilities, adding to its functionality as part of a broader home system.Wi-Fi Quick Connect: Facilitates installation and reliable connectivity.This remote is geared toward users seeking simplicity and portability in their smart home control options.Applications and ConsiderationsURC’s latest offerings reflect the growing demand for devices that unify control across multiple systems while emphasizing usability. According to a 2023 Deloitte survey, features such as security, remote monitoring, and time-saving automation are key drivers in smart home adoption. The TDC-8300 and TRC-1120 align with these priorities, providing tools to address these trends in a practical way.These devices will be available through URC’s network of certified dealers, with a focus on professional installation to ensure optimal performance.‍‍‍If you are interested in scheduling for one of our professional engineers to meet with you or your interior designer for your remodel or new construction project in Palm Desert or rest of the Coachella Valley, we may be reached at:Phone: (760) 799-0881Email: Sales@AVIR.comAsk for Yasin or Charley.‍‍‍‍Services:Home CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworking‍Proudly serving the entire Coachella Valley and surrounding areas:BanningBeaumontBermuda DunesBig BearCathedral CityCoachellaIdyllwildIndian WellsIndioJoshua TreeLa QuintaLake ArrowheadMoreno ValleyMurrietaPalm DesertPalm SpringsRancho MirageRedlandsRiversideSan BernardinoTemeculaThermalThousand PalmsYucaipaYucca Valley ‍‍‍‍‍Engage the expertsAVIR operates within the Coachella Valley region, providing exclusive smart automation services for residential and commercial properties.Call760.779.0881Visit our Showroom41905 Boardwalk, Suite XPalm Desert, CA 92211NavigationHomeServicesBrandsExciting ProductsPortfolioAboutCareersContactServicesHome CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworkingExciting ProductsBrowse some of the most exclusive products we can bring to your next technology installation.Find out moreProudly serving the entire Coachella Valley and surrounding areas:BanningBeaumontBermuda DunesBig BearCathedral CityCoachellaIdyllwildIndian WellsIndioJoshua TreeLa QuintaLake ArrowheadMoreno ValleyMurrietaPalm DesertPalm SpringsRancho MirageRedlandsRiversideSan BernardinoTemeculaThermalThousand PalmsYucaipaYucca ValleyCopyright © 2023.
